things.name: Aalborg Castle (Aalborghus)
things.description: 16th-century royal fortress with dungeons and scenic ramparts over the Limfjord

things.name: Lindholm Hoje
things.description: UNESCO candidate Viking burial ground with 682 graves and open-air museum

things.name: Utzon Center
things.description: Cultural centre designed by Jorn Utzon, architect of the Sydney Opera House

things.name: Aalborg Museum of History
things.description: Local history from Viking times in the preserved medieval quarter

things.name: Budolfi Church
things.description: Baroque white church with a carillon playing Danish folk tunes

things.name: Aalborg Zoo
things.description: Popular zoo with over 1,200 animals in naturalistic habitats

things.name: Rebild National Park
things.description: Denmark's only national park with heathland, forests and the world's largest 4 July celebration

things.name: Nordkraft
things.description: Regenerated power station converted to cultural centre with concerts and art

things.name: Aalborg Old Town
things.description: Historic core with half-timbered houses and the old merchant street Ostergade

things.name: Jungle World
things.description: Year-round tropical environment with exotic plants and animals
